text: - BLOCKING [main.rs](/Users/pablofernandez/Work/29er/crates/29er-tui/src/main.rs:39), [login.rs](/Users/pablofernandez/Work/29er/crates/29er-tui/src/ui/login.rs:18), [app.rs](/Users/pablofernandez/Work/29er/crates/29er-tui/src/app.rs:307): relay selection/default relay policy is shell-owned and hardcoded. Move relay/default/fallback selection into Rust/NMP state/actions; the TUI should render the active relay and dispatch selection intent.
